description: Perform automated particle tracking on the 5D microscopy hyperstack `~/Fiji_Data/raw/tracking/mitosis.tif` using the TrackMate plugin to track dividing nuclei/chromosomes. Use a Max Intensity Z-Projection of the chromosome channel for tracking. Configure the tracking pipeline using a LoG or DoG detector with an estimated blob diameter of ~8.0 microns and a threshold between 2.0-5.0. Use a Simple LAP tracker with a linking max distance of 10.0 microns, a gap-closing max distance of 10.0 microns, and a max frame gap of 2. Export the track statistics to `~/Fiji_Data/results/tracking/track_statistics.csv` and save a visual overlay of the tracks to `~/Fiji_Data/results/tracking/tracks_visual.png`.
